content:
import AlgebraicJacobian.RiemannRoch.Adelic.Cokernel

set_option autoImplicit false

universe u

open CategoryTheory Limits TopologicalSpace AlgebraicGeometry AlgebraicTopology
open CategoryTheory.Limits

namespace AlgebraicGeometry.Scheme

section Probe

variable {k : Type u} [Field k] {C : Over (Spec (CommRingCat.of k))}
  (S : C.left.AffineCoverMVSquare)
  (F : Sheaf (Opens.grothendieckTopology C.left.toTopCat) (ModuleCat.{u} k))

-- The index type
example : True := by
  let ι := ULift.{u} (Fin 2)
  trivial

-- Probe: is (cechCochain).X 1 defeq to a ∏ᶜ ?
noncomputable example :
    (AlgebraicGeometry.Scheme.cechCochain C F S.coverFamily).X 1 =
      (cechCosimplicial S.coverFamily F).obj (SimplexCategory.mk 1) := rfl

end Probe

end AlgebraicGeometry.Scheme
